title: dendranthema boreale var. tomentellum
intro: Dendranthema boreale var. tomentellum, commonly known as the woolly asters or hairy chrysanthemum, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dendranthema boreale var. tomentellum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Dendranthema boreale var. tomentellum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
